title: Starlink Direct-to-Cell Reaches ~10 Million Monthly Mobile Users Through Carrier Partners
detail: SpaceX's Starlink Direct-to-Cell service was reaching approximately 10 million active users per month through partner mobile carriers as of April 2026, with the company targeting 25+ million by end of year. Carrier partnerships include Deutsche Telekom (Europe, with 10-country rollout expected by 2028), T-Mobile (United States), and operators in Japan, Australia, and Canada. The Direct-to-Cell technology — enabling standard unmodified smartphones to connect via satellite in areas with no cell tower coverage — represents a transformative potential for developing-market connectivity, eliminating the need for specialized hardware that has limited Starlink's direct subscriber reach among lower-income populations.

sources.name: Domain-B: Starlink Growth and SpaceX Global Expansion 2026
5G Store: FCC Rule to Make Starlink Faster and Cheaper in 2026

media.caption: Starlink mobile users reach 10 million per month through carrier partnerships globally
